examples: The ploughman homeward plods his weary way.
Teacher, you are the ploughman beauty, the sower of beauty.
A ploughman yoked his ox and his ass together, and set to work to plough his field.
For most of the cold war, Mr Pipes was a lonely ploughman.
" But to claim authorship of the poem would have lessened its authenticity in the eyes of Burns, who relished his own reputation as a "heaven-taught ploughman.
